focus: security -- PASS B: secret redaction in evidence/logs and state persistence safety

findingDetails.title: Verifier exception messages bypass secret redaction before persistence and injection/status output
findingDetails.claim: A secret-bearing supervisor-verifier exception message is sanitized but not redacted, then persisted as lastVerifierReason and surfaced through injection_preview in status/chat output.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Reviewed normal verifier evidence normalization and supervisor tests. Normal rawResult.evidence and fallback evidence are redacted through redactEvidence, and tests assert API key plus sk-... samples do not remain in stored evidence or status output. No equivalent code path or test redacts error.message before it becomes lastVerifierReason.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: If every configured supervisorVerifier implementation is fully trusted and guaranteed never to throw secret-bearing messages, this becomes a hardening gap rather than an active leak. That guarantee is not enforced at the plugin boundary.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 only if the verifier boundary is constrained so exception messages cannot contain user, provider, transport, credential, or connection-string data, and that constraint is covered by tests.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact read of all redactEvidence, lastVerifierReason, renderGoalInjection, goalStateLines, and failure/error paths found one unredacted exception-to-status/injection route; debug and continuation logs do not write evidence/objective text.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: non-trivial security review of plugin state persistence, redaction, status, injection, and logging paths

targetSelection.selectionReason: Prompt-named security pass B targets for redaction helpers, verifier/status output, logs, and state path safety.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Verifier exception messages can carry token-shaped text through sanitization-only handling into persisted verifier reason and status/injection output.

searchActions.result: catch path stores sanitizeInlineText(error.message) as verifier reason without redactEvidence
lastVerifierReason is included in renderGoalInjection and emitted through injection_preview

searchLedger.rationale: Redaction helper coverage exists but is bypassed by the verifier exception path.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Normal verifier evidence may bypass redaction before persistence/status output.

searchActions.result: normal verifier evidence is passed through redactEvidence
tests cover api_key and sk-... redaction in stored evidence and status output

searchLedger.rationale: The normal evidence path applies redactEvidence and has positive coverage for representative secrets.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by direct read and existing assertions

searchLedger.hypothesis: A crafted session id or objective can escape the intended state directory.

searchActions.result: session id is hex encoded before being used as a filename; objective is not part of the path
tests assert hex filenames for session-a/session-b

searchLedger.rationale: Session-derived filenames cannot contain path separators after hex encoding.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by direct read and existing state tests

searchLedger.invariant: Newly created state directories and per-session JSON files should not be broadly readable.

searchActions.result: state dir is created with 0700 and temp state files are opened with 0600 before rename

searchLedger.rationale: The per-session JSON state path uses restrictive directory and file creation modes.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Debug or continuation logs write raw objective/evidence text to shared logs.

searchActions.result: logs contain session id, decision/reason/event type, and turn count; no objective, prompt, evidence, or injection preview

searchLedger.rationale: Reviewed log payloads do not include the high-risk text fields.

title: Verifier exception messages bypass secret redaction before persistence and injection/status output

detail: security pass B covered redaction helper patterns, verifier evidence/status output, injection preview, debug/continuation logs, state path construction, and state file permissions with graphless fallback because code graph freshness was stale

reason: session ids are hex encoded before filename construction and objective text is not part of any path
new state directories use 0700 and per-session JSON temp files are opened 0600 before rename
debug and continuation log payloads do not include objective, goal prompt, verifier evidence, or injection preview
normal verifier evidence redaction aligns, but verifier exception messages bypass redaction before injection/status output
